mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN knowledge_file f ON f.id = ( SELECT current_file.id FROM knowledge_file current_file WHERE current_file.entry_id = e.id AND current_file.is_current = 1 AND current_file.status = 1 ORDER BY current_file.uploaded_at DESC, current_file.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, CASE WHEN f.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('', f.id) END AS file_id, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.secret_level, e.version, e.release_date, f.file_ext AS file_type, e.profession_code, e.author_name, e.info_status, f.original_file_name, e.created_at, e.updated_at
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.pageSize}

SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.keywords, e.version, e.project_name, e.release_date, e.system_source, e.profession_code, e.author_name, e.secret_level, e.info_status, CASE WHEN f.id IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('', f.id) END AS file_id, f.original_file_name, f.file_ext AS file_type, f.file_size, f.upload_status, f.uploaded_at FROM knowledge_entry e
WHERE e.id = #{entryId} AND e.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_entry ( id, entry_type, entry_code, title, keywords, version, project_name, release_date, system_source, profession_code, author_name, secret_level, info_status, status, delete_marker, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{entryId}, #{request.entryType}, #{request.entryCode}, #{request.title}, #{request.keywords}, #{request.version}, #{request.projectName}, #{request.releaseDate}, #{request.systemSource}, #{request.professionCode}, #{request.authorName}, #{request.secretLevel}, 1, 1, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO knowledge_entry ( id, entry_type, entry_code, title, version, info_status, status, delete_marker, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{entryId}, #{entryType}, #{entryCode}, #{title}, 'TEMP', 0, 1, 0, NULL, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM knowledge_entry WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT info_status FROM knowledge_entry WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id AS file_id, entry_id, original_file_name, file_ext AS file_type, file_size, uploaded_at, upload_status FROM knowledge_file WHERE id = #{fileId} AND entry_id = #{entryId} AND status = 1 AND is_current = 1 AND upload_status = 'success'
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge_entry SET entry_type = #{request.entryType}, entry_code = #{request.entryCode}, title = #{request.title}, keywords = #{request.keywords}, version = #{request.version}, project_name = #{request.projectName}, release_date = #{request.releaseDate}, system_source = #{request.systemSource}, profession_code = #{request.professionCode}, author_name = #{request.authorName}, secret_level = #{request.secretLevel}, info_status = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1
UPDATE knowledge_entry SET delete_marker = id, status = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{entryId} AND status = 1
UPDATE knowledge_file SET status = 0 WHERE entry_id = #{entryId} AND status = 1
mapper.sql: SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, CONCAT('', f.id) AS file_id, f.original_file_name, f.file_ext AS file_type, f.file_size, f.uploaded_at, f.upload_status, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.keywords, e.version, e.project_name, e.release_date, e.system_source, e.profession_code, e.author_name, e.secret_level FROM knowledge_entry e INNER JOIN knowledge_file f ON f.id = ( SELECT current_file.id FROM knowledge_file current_file WHERE current_file.entry_id = e.id AND current_file.status = 1 AND current_file.is_current = 1 AND current_file.upload_status = 'success' ORDER BY current_file.uploaded_at DESC, current_file.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE e.status = 1 AND e.info_status = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT('', e.id) AS entry_id, CONCAT('', f.id) AS file_id, e.entry_type, e.entry_code, e.title, e.keywords, e.project_name, e.system_source, e.profession_code, e.author_name, f.original_file_name, f.file_ext AS file_type
ORDER BY e.updated_at DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{request.offset}, #{request.pageSize}
